content.speakerText: Wait, you said you saw a deer? Was it close?
content.speakerTextCn: 等等，你说看到鹿了？离得近吗？

options.text: Yeah, like 10 feet away—I almost screamed!
I don't like deer, so I ran away.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体距离和情感反应（'almost screamed'）来增强画面感，符合追问细节的社交策略。其他选项要么偏离主题（如提到下雨、熊），要么是情绪反应而非对问题的直接回应。

content.speakerText: That’s insane! Did you take any pics?
content.speakerTextCn: 太疯狂了！你拍照片了吗？

options.text: Of course! I’ve got one with the deer in the background—want to see?
I’ll send you the video later.

content.explanation: 正确答案不仅确认拍照，还主动提出分享，延续对话。选项2是自我评价，未回应问题；选项3是无关信息；选项4虽然接近，但提到'video'与原对话中'pics'（照片）不一致，语境不符。

content.speakerText: You mentioned you go hiking every weekend—what’s your favorite trail?
content.speakerTextCn: 你提到你每个周末都去徒步，最喜欢的步道是哪条？

options.text: Blue Ridge Trail—it has the best views and wildflowers in spring.
I don’t know the name, but it’s far.
I hate hiking, I just do it for exercise.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体名称和感官细节（'best views', 'wildflowers in spring'），符合深入兴趣场景的核心策略。选项1是典型无关回答，选项3模糊无细节，选项4否定了兴趣本身，破坏对话氛围。

content.template: So close I could see ______ eyes!
content.hint: 指代前面提到的鹿，需要用物主代词
content.knowledgePoint: 物主代词使用（its vs it's）

content.template: I’ve got one with the deer in the ______—want to see?
content.hint: 描述照片中物体位置的常用词

content.template: I was so excited I ______ my camera out right away.
content.hint: 快速拿出相机的常用动词搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（pull out a camera）

content.speakerText: Wait, you said you saw a deer? Was it close?
content.speakerTextCn: 等等，你说看到鹿了？离得近吗？
expectedAnswers: Yeah, only about 8 feet—I could even see the spots on its fur!
I think it was around 15 feet away. It stared at me for a full 10 seconds!
So close that my heart stopped for a second!
evaluationCriteria: 是否回应了距离问题并提供具体数值或描述
是否使用感官细节（视觉、听觉、情绪）增强画面感
是否使用自然口语表达而非机械句式

content.speakerText: That’s insane! Did you take any pics?
content.speakerTextCn: 太疯狂了！你拍照片了吗？
expectedAnswers: Definitely! I’ve got a couple—I’ll send you the best one later.
I did! There’s one where it’s mid-step, like it’s about to run.
Actually yes—I didn’t think I’d get a shot, but I’m really happy with how it turned out!
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确回答是否拍照（yes/no）
是否主动提出分享或描述照片内容以延续话题
是否使用自然口语表达（如'I’m really happy with how it turned out'）

content.speakerText: You said you collect vintage records—what’s the rarest one you’ve found?
content.speakerTextCn: 你说你收藏古董唱片，最稀有的是哪一张？
expectedAnswers: A 1969 pressing of Pink Floyd’s 'Dark Side of the Moon'—only 300 were made!
I found one by a local band from the '70s that no one’s ever heard of.
It’s a first edition of a Bob Dylan album with a misprint on the cover.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确指出具体物品（唱片名称、年份、特点）
是否提供稀有性或独特性细节（限量、错误、冷门）
是否使用自然口语节奏，避免书面化表达
